description_long: This is a classic-style scooter with a vibrant red body and a beige seat, reminiscent of vintage Vespa models. The frame is streamlined with rounded edges, featuring a prominent front shield and side panels that cover the engine and rear wheel. The handlebars are black with chrome accents and include rearview mirrors, while the wheels are white-walled with metallic hubs. The seat is long and cushioned, designed for two riders, and the rear section includes a taillight and a small storage compartment. The scooter has a headlight integrated into the front handlebar assembly and a visible kickstand beneath the deck. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban commuting.
description: A vintage red scooter with a beige seat, rounded body panels, and chrome-accented handlebars. It features white-walled tires, a front headlight, and a classic urban commuter design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide red front shield, central headlight, and handlebars with black grips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, beige seat, and white-walled tires.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the beige seat, handlebar layout, and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine cover, rear wheel, and the classic scooter profile.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, moderately wide, smooth surface with integrated footrest area
attribute_brand_logo: Script-style logo on the upper left of the front shield
